title: BELICOO Large Picture Hanging Strips Heavy Duty, 40-Pairs(80 Strips) No Nails Water Resistant Adhesive Strips, 100 * 20mm Damage Free Photo Frame Stickers for Wall, Hanging Posters
features: 【Strong Adhesion】The Picture Hanging Strips Kit (40 Pairs/80 Strips,100*20mm) can replace nails or liquid adhesives.Wall hanging strips are backed with high-quality adhesive backing, compared with ordinary double-sided adhesive, stronger adhesion. Perfect for photos, artwork, or Christmas decorations.
【Hanging Pictures Without Nails】Hang picture frames, wall art, mirrors, wall clocks, power strips, and other holiday decorations where you want without nails or hammers.

【Removes Quickly and Cleanly】Picture hanging strips remove cleanly without leaving holes, marks or sticky residue on a variety of surfaces. So you can hang your favorite photographs, kid’s artwork, banners, posters and signs etc damage free,and leaving no damage or residue like traditional hooks and tapes.Perfect choice for renovating or organizing your space.

【 Multi-Use】Belicoo picture hanging strips work on a variety of smooth surfaces, including finished wood, painted concrete cinder blocks, laminate, tile, glass, marble, metal, wood, and plastic. But DO NOT recommend for use on wallpaper, fabrics, textured walls, brick, or other rough and non-stick surfaces.
【100% Service Satisfaction】If you have any questions about these Picture Hanging Strips, please feel free to contact us, we will give you a satisfactory answer.
